comments.html:
So what you are saying is that a self-fulfilling prophecy, is indeed self fulfilling?

Holy counter productive, Batman!
comments.name: John Howard

comments.html: What goes around, comes around. I think Ansible team is ignoring you because you're well known for your rants.
comments.name: Anonymous

comments.html:
I already wrote in the other blog post that you get what you pay. What else do you expect, Johny boy?

Stop whining.
comments.name: Anonymous

comments.html:
What frustrates me, is that no more than 6 months ago we were all in the NAF Slack, discussing the fact that Ansible seems to be a paid for product only now, and we were overrun with Redhatters that said "if you just opened an issue, all problems would be addressed". Largely they were implying this was bellyaching and that none of us "follow the rules"

We called it at the time, and I call it again now. The Opensource is gone well past best effort now.

Ansible is a paid product.
comments.name: John Howard
